modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to open Excel files or experiencing freezes

full_description_text:
- I am having a problem with Excel on my Windows computer.  
- Sometimes it will not open any files from One Drive and it just freezes.  
- Other times, when I am working on a document, Excel locks up and I can't do anything.  
- This is really frustrating because I need to use Excel for my work.
short_description: Unable to open Excel files or experiencing freezes
